Title: Open Banking Vulnerability Scanner
Product Description: A deeply detailed technical manual outlining a Python script that leverages an LLM to scan Open Banking API routing tables for broken object-level authorization vulnerabilities, mapping payload structures and outputting an exploit probability report.
Expected Role: Unknown (Unclear if it is an internal developer tool or an enterprise product).
S1 (Purpose/Domain): 40% (Clear technical action, but absolute zero sector or application context).
S3 (Autonomy): 60% (Generates a report, but workflow destination is hidden).
S5 (Integration): 0% (Deployment host architecture is a complete vacuum).
Notes: High technical density but zero regulatory signals. If this tool is used for internal corporate R&D, it is Exempt. If it is integrated into a live pipeline for a nuclear power plant's API architecture, it is High Risk. If sold as a standard standalone code checking application, it is Minimal Risk.

Title: Multi-Dimensional Behavioral Clustering Engine
Product Description: Detailed mathematical outline of an unsupervised K-means clustering algorithm checking streaming server access logs to flag deviations in database retrieval speeds across 12 distinct performance vector indices.
Notes: Complete absence of contextual intent. If the database logs contain consumer bank transaction histories to flag credit defaults, it is High Risk. If it tracks temperature patterns on hardware server chips, it is Minimal Risk.

Title: Structuring JSON Metadata Transformer
Product Description: Comprehensive API endpoint schema mapping an LLM task designed to ingest complex multi-page PDF documents, identify name/value pairs, and output cleanly formatted schema-validated JSON outputs to an AWS S3 bucket.
Notes: Missing intent and value chain positioning. The text details how the data changes shape, but completely masks what the data represents (e.g., medical diagnostics vs. public bank holiday calendars).

Title: High-Throughput Real-Time Stream Dashboard
Product Description: Front-end configuration file detailing a 3D visualization dashboard using Three.js and an interactive text window to summarize high-volume event data streaming at up to 10,000 queries per second.
Notes: Strong interface signal (S4 is 100%) but total failure on governance context. The model cannot determine if the dashboard is monitoring traffic safety systems or basic video game servers.

Title: Transactional Database Generator Profile
Product Description: Dense technical guide for configuring an AI script to review core banking ledgers and output mock records with matching mathematical balances for regression tracking.
Notes: Missing the distribution channel context. If this system is locked internally for developer tests, it is Exempt. If packaged as a commercial dataset generator for third parties, it triggers Limited Risk obligations.
